self in JavaScript: What Is It, and How's It Different from this?
self
this

You'll run into `self` sooner or later when you read real-world JavaScript, so it's worth knowing what it actually is. In this post we'll look at what `self` means, how it relates to `this`, and why the two behave very differently even though they sometimes look identical.

Learning Python From a JavaScript Perspective

JavaScript has about twenty array methods, and as it turns out, Python has roughly the same number. Learning Python From a JavaScript Angle (5) - Functions
Learn Python From JavaScript

Last time we talked about types and variables, so this time there's no dodging functions. Functions are a real sticking point for a lot of beginners, so I'll share a simple way to think about when you should reach for a function, plus how to practice writing them — all coming at it from a JavaScript angle.
